name: Channelsong
desc_clean: Awoken 1 The Channelers of the Wildwood prefer to keep their involvement in its growth to a minimum.
mechanic_summary: Channelsong to Spell klanu Awoken. Awoken 1 The Channelers of the Wildwood prefer to keep their involvement in its growth to a minimum. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Awoken 1 The Channelers of the Wildwood prefer to keep their involvement in its growth to a minimum. However, their intervention is sometimes required to achieve more “aggressive” expansion.
